case.title: RAILWAY CONDUCTORS v. CLINCHFIELD R. CO

opinion.h: RAILWAY CONDUCTORS v. CLINCHFIELD R. CO , 395 U.S. 841 (1969)
ORDER OF RAILWAY CONDUCTORS AND BRAKEMEN AND BROTHERHOOD OF RAILROAD TRAINMEN, petitioners, v. CLINCHFIELD RAILROAD COMPANY. No. 385.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the Sixth Circuit.
Denied. [ Railway Conductors v. Clinchfield R. Co 395 U.S. 841 (1969) ]
